title: Modern Leaf Decay
description: A Fabric mod to clear leaves as soon as a tree is felled.
body:
When a log is broken, this plugin checks for adjacent leaves and instantly breaks them in a cascade, so you don't have to wait for the leaves to decay at their natural Minecraft rate.

Forked from [https://github.com/omega-mc/leaf-decay/](https://github.com/omega-mc/leaf-decay/) to add new MC version support and clean up code.
